overview: Ice Hound is a Normal-class Beast/Demon monster found in Ice Abyss. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 140 HP, 22 physical damage, 100 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 3. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage:  at 160% ratio (352 base damage). Sight range 1300, combat radius 150. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: .

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weakness: Fire
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains:
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: . These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1300 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1300 units, loses target at 1800 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 150, ability check distance 200
strategies.description: Combat area radius 150. Ability check distance 200.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1300 units. Loses target at 1800 units.
